title: Scratch Herdr cockpit layout v2 proof
goal: Create a deterministic scratch proof for the desired Herdr cockpit layout v2 before changing daemon worker placement: no unused root shell, left worker region, right full-height dashboard, and documented 1-4 worker geometry.
acceptance: Add scripts/proof-herdr-layout-v2 with a dry-run mode and a real mode that uses harmless shell commands, not KD workers, to exercise Herdr pane split/move/close/layout mechanics for the v2 cockpit shape.

The proof defines the target layout as a left worker region and a right full-height dashboard, with 1 worker filling the worker region, 2 workers side-by-side, and 3-4 workers arranged as a 2x2 grid or a documented Herdr-backed fallback.

Write docs/design/evidence/herdr-layout-v2-proof-2026-07-08.md with commands, observed Herdr capabilities, limitations, and explicit confirmation that pane layout/scrollback is observability only and not KD correctness evidence.
Do not change daemon runtime behavior in this slice.
must_ask_if: The proof would require closing or moving panes outside a scratch Khazad-Doom layout proof workspace.
Herdr lacks a necessary layout primitive and the proposed fallback changes the user-visible target layout.
